creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

AFAICT, audit@FreeBSD.org has been defunct for around 10 years[0], and we've actively missed at least one PR [1] because it's still around for assignment -- can we reassign any bugs that are assigned to it to another list (bugs@ may be the most appropriate) and drop it from Bugzilla?

Thanks,

Kyle Evans

[0] https://marc.info/?l=freebsd-audit&m=128862153919222&w=2
[1] bug #242938
